headline: AI Language Translation and Interpretation: LLM-Based Translation, Simultaneous Interpretation, and Quality Estimation
description: AI translation has evolved from phrase tables to LLMs that match human translators on common language pairs and provide real-time spoken interpretation for multilingual meetings. From GPT-4 translating with document-level coherence to KUDO AI interpreting with <2s latency, language barriers are dissolving through AI.

citation.name: Machine Translation in the Era of Large Language Models: A Comprehensive Survey of LLM-Based Translation (2025)
Simultaneous Machine Translation and Speech-to-Speech Interpretation: Streaming Models, Wait-k Policies, and Voice Preservation
